title: observed_model
description: Output contract of the plan-extract-v2 pipeline. Consumed by the Ruby/SketchUp bridge (ROADMAP Fase 6) and by downstream QA tooling. Shape is append-only; old fields are kept until a major bump.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Consumers SHOULD pin to a major.

run_id.description: Hex UUID (uuid4.hex) identifying this pipeline run.

roi.description: Per-page ROI detection result. Empty list on SVG / synthetic raster inputs (no ROI step was run).

walls.description: Classified, dedup'ed and topology-split walls. Coordinates are in source units (PDF page pixels @ 150 DPI; SVG user-units).

junctions.description: Graph nodes produced by build_topology where two or more walls meet (or a dangling endpoint).

rooms.description: Polygons found by shapely.polygonize over the wall graph. Empty is a VALID observation (CLAUDE.md invariant #1) — downstream MUST handle rooms=[].

warnings.description: Structured warning codes emitted by the pipeline. Duplicated inside metadata.warnings for backward compat.

openings.description: Doors / passages / windows detected as colinear gaps between two walls.

peitoris.description: Window-sill hints passed into the pipeline (used to reclassify openings as 'window'). Pass-through field: the pipeline does NOT detect peitoris itself — it consumes them.

Point2D.description: [x, y] in source units (origin top-left, y-axis increases downward).

Source.description: Provenance for this run. Extra fields appear depending on source_type.

filename.description: Original filename as submitted. null when the pipeline was invoked with in-memory raster (debug/tests).

source_type.description: Ingest path taken. 'pdf' runs the raster pipeline (HoughLinesP + classify). 'svg' runs the vector pipeline (ingest_svg + main_component + openings refinement). 'raster' is a debug-only entry point.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of the raw input bytes. null for the 'raster' source_type.

viewbox_width.description: SVG only. Width of the root <svg> viewBox in user-units.

viewbox_height.description: SVG only. Height of the root <svg> viewBox in user-units.

stroke_width_median.description: SVG only. Median stroke-width over accepted paths. Seeds opening thresholds in detect_openings.

stroke_width_samples.description: SVG only. Distinct stroke-width values observed in accepted paths.

Bounds.description: Axis-aligned bounding box per page, computed from final split walls.

RoiEntry.description: Result of detect_architectural_roi for one page. Raster path only.

Wall.description: A wall segment after topology split. parent_wall_id points to the classified pre-split wall; when no split happened, the segment's wall_id itself equals its parent's id. source is the detector that produced it.

source.description: Known producers: 'hough_horizontal', 'hough_vertical' (raster), 'svg' (vector ingest), 'opening_bridge' (ghost wall inserted by detect_openings to close a door gap). New detectors (LSD, CubiCasa5K) append their own strings — consumers MUST treat this as open-ended.

Junction.description: Graph node at a wall endpoint or intersection. 'kind' is derived from degree.

kind.description: degree=1 -> end; degree=2 -> pass_through; degree=3 -> tee; degree>=4 -> cross.

Room.description: Polygon detected by shapely.polygonize over the wall graph. polygon is a CLOSED ring (last vertex MAY or MAY NOT equal the first — consumers SHOULD re-close defensively).

Opening.description: A door/window/passage detected as a colinear gap between two walls. wall_a and wall_b reference wall_ids before topology split (i.e. parent-level ids from the detect_openings stage) — they MAY NOT resolve against observed_model.walls[].wall_id directly if walls were later split.

kind.description: window only when a peitoril hint overlaps the opening center; passage when width > door_max; door otherwise.

Peitoril.description: Window-sill hint. Only 'bbox' is read by the pipeline; extra keys are passed through untouched.

bbox.description: [x1, y1, x2, y2] in source units.

Scores.description: Observational scores. NOT quality gates — they reflect what the extractor observed, never ground truth (CLAUDE.md invariant #6).

geometry.description: Retention: walls_kept / candidates_in. SVG path always reports 1.0 (no candidates to filter). Do not interpret as 'quality'.

topology.description: (intra_page_connectivity_ratio + 1 / max_components_within_page) / 2. 1.0 means single connected component per page.

rooms.description: 0.5 + rooms_count / edges_count, clamped to 1.0. 0 when no rooms. A room density proxy, not a correctness score.

Metadata.description: Non-geometric annotations about the run. Required: rooms_detected, topology_quality, connectivity, warnings. Optional keys appear only on specific pipeline paths — see per-field descriptions.

topology_quality.description: good if topology score >= 0.8, fair if >= 0.5, else poor.

openings_refinement.description: SVG path only. Audit trail of the four post-detection filters from openings/pruning.py. Present since schema 2.2.0.

topology_snapshot_sha256.description: Hash of the canonicalized (walls, junctions) tuple. Stable across cosmetic run_id changes; used by regression tests to detect topology drift.

ConnectivityReport.description: Graph connectivity metrics computed by topology.service.

OpeningsRefinement.description: Audit trail of the four SVG-only opening filters. Each sub-report records input_count (count going in), kept (count going out), and filter-specific drop bookkeeping.
